steps.title: Divide both sides by 7
steps.content: Starting with $$7|x - 7| = 42$$, divide both sides by 7 to get $$|x - 7| = 6$$.

steps.title: Find the sum of solutions using the standard pattern
steps.content:
For any equation $|x - a| = b$, the sum of the two solutions equals $2a$ (since the solutions are $a - b$ and $a + b$, which sum to $2a$).

In our case, $a = 7$, so the sum is $2(7) = 14$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
